sectiondef.header: Channel constants (inspired by the ITC XOP)

briefdescription.para: Can be combined, using bitwise or, with all integer types.

detaileddescription.para: Convenience definition to nicify expressions like DimSize(wv, ROWS) easier to read than DimSize(wv, 0).

sectiondef.header: Constants for NWB version 2 specifications and base classes

briefdescription.para: Maximum length of a valid name in bytes in Igor Pro.
